bounded_at_most_one_rework.description: Same evidence as the accepted loop case, but interpreted as a process where a second rework is invalid.
bounded_at_most_one_rework.interpretation: second loop iteration should be rejected under a bounded-count domain prior

multi_body_loop_choice.description: Two alternative rework bodies around the same anchor; this is outside ALG-0023's singleton-body scope.
multi_body_loop_choice.interpretation: a richer loop-with-choice miner would be needed

nested_loop_with_choice_context.description: A loop with choice-like body evidence inside sequence context.
nested_loop_with_choice_context.interpretation: nested choice in loop body is outside ALG-0023 scope

one_iteration_only_with_clean_dfg_path.description: Only one loop iteration is observed; requiring zero-iteration evidence should prevent loop inference.
one_iteration_only_with_clean_dfg_path.interpretation: no zero-iteration evidence, so loop detection should refuse

prefixed_suffixed_single_rework.description: The same singleton rework loop embedded inside a longer sequence context.
prefixed_suffixed_single_rework.interpretation: prefix and suffix context should not block the singleton loop cut
